---
id: handle-token-refresh
title: "Refresh access token"
description: "Validates the refresh token from the httpOnly cookie and issues a new short-lived access token. Rate limited to 30 requests per hour per session"
sidebar_label: "Refresh access token"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/rushomon-url-shortener-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Refresh access token"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/auth/refresh"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Validates the refresh token from the httpOnly cookie and issues a new short-lived access token. Rate limited to 30 requests per hour per session

</ParamsDetails>
